description_long: This house features a prominent, multi-gabled roof with dark shingles and a combination of white and dark exterior walls, giving it a modern yet classic suburban appearance. The structure is set on a rectangular lot with a large driveway and a green lawn area, bordered by a sidewalk and street. The front facade includes a covered entryway with steps, flanked by windows and a small porch area. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on the visible sides, with a chimney rising from the roof. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard, separated by a fence, and the side view reveals additional access points and architectural detailing. The overall design suggests a comfortable, family-oriented residence with ample outdoor space and a focus on curb appeal.
description: A modern suburban house with a multi-gabled roof, white and dark exterior, symmetrical windows, and a spacious yard with driveway and lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, and symmetrical window arrangement with the driveway and lawn visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, chimney, and a row of windows along the side wall, with the street and sidewalk adjacent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, rear entry, and additional windows, with the lawn and fence clearly visible.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view showing the overall layout, including the house, driveway, lawn, and surrounding property boundaries.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, small porch, and flanking windows
